title: Vacancy for Category Manager at GKB Opticals International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at GKB Opticals International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at GKB Opticals International Enterprises. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Pune-based team.

About GKB Opticals International Enterprises:
GKB Opticals International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals International Enterprises!
